items.name_en: 【Green】
items.name_cn:
【Green】
CALYPSO_ Elephant Calfskin Chain Bag
Made from imported Italian calf leather, it is soft and delicate to the touch. The classic Y logo, chain, and buckle eyes are finished in matte gold hardware. The bag features a magnetic four-clasp closure at the opening for excellent security. Inside, there is a zippered pocket for your phone and valuables; aside from this, there are no extra pockets, allowing for effortless use!
Size: 35.5×21×9cm
Model: 777399

items.name_en: Mint Green
items.name_cn:
Mint Green
GABY MINI Box Bag
The adorable new arrival for the upcoming spring and summer season~ Roseanne Park's matching makeup bag/box bag, featuring lambskin + unique stitching craftsmanship, double zipper design for easy opening, small body with large capacity, detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, also serves as a makeup bag, exquisite and practical, the latest bestseller, well-deserved.
Style: 766731
Size: 18x11x6.5cm

items.name_en: Matte Gold Leaf Clasp
items.name_cn:
Matte Gold Leaf Clasp
Niki_baby
Unisex casual academic shoulder and crossbody bag
Suede paired with lightweight soft calfskin lining. Low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter silhouette works for both casual and chic styles. The iconic logo design is minimalist. The strap works for both shoulder and crossbody to easily create a look.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Style No.: 633151-1
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_en: Sage Green · New Size
items.name_cn:
Sage Green · New Size
JAMIE 4.3 · 29cm
The new large bag really hit the spot, who understands? 💕
Imported Italian lamb skin. The overall bag shape features a classic vintage distressed design, breaking elements for a very stylish look that won't go out of style. The basic style can also be paired with a lot of feel, not a common sight. Durable material, versatile for commuting, super large capacity, unexpectedly lightweight, and high practicality. An absolute must-have item! 😎
Style No.: 809696
Size: 29×21×9.5cm
